mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (parent_id, review_type, user_id, product_id, order_id, rating, content, images) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{reviewType}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{orderId}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{images})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM review WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM review WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM review ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM review WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND order_id = #{orderId} AND product_id = #{productId}
SELECT * FROM review WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND order_id = #{orderId} AND product_id = #{productId} AND review_type = 0
SELECT * FROM review WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET reply_content = #{replyContent}, reply_at = #{replyAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE review SET content = #{content}, images = #{images} WHERE id = #{id}
